items.title: A Former Top Trump Official Is Going After Prediction Markets
items.description: As the battle over prediction markets rages on, Mick Mulvaney is leading a new coalition that calls these platforms illegal gambling.

items.title: When the Internet Goes Dark, the Truth Goes With It
items.description: Palestinian journalist Plestia Alaqad on bearing witness, the fragile power of social media, and why documenting lived reality matters more than ever.

items.title: The Data Centers Have Arrived at the Edge of the Arctic Circle
items.description: As AI labs gorge themselves on compute, data center operators have headed north in search of cheap and plentiful energy.
